Home.heroTitle: Find Your Perfect Home in Nairobi
Home.heroSub: Premium apartments and homes in Parklands, Kilimani, and Nairobi's most sought-after neighbourhoods. Trusted by families and investors since day one.
Home.introImageAlt: Sunlit contemporary living space in Nairobi
Home.introTitle: Welcome to Dirrir Realtor Limited — Your Real Estate Professional
Home.introP1: At Dirrir Realtor, we believe that finding a home should be an experience, not a hassle. Whether you're searching for a modern apartment in Parklands, a family home in Kilimani, or an investment property with strong rental yields, our team is here to guide you every step of the way.
Home.introP2: As part of the Rabat Properties Limited family, we bring deep local knowledge, transparent dealings, and a personal touch that sets us apart. We serve clients across Nairobi and beyond — from first-time buyers to seasoned diaspora investors looking to build wealth through Kenyan real estate.
Home.servicesSub: End-to-end real estate support tailored to Nairobi's prime neighbourhoods.
Home.editorialStripAlt: Modern residential tower facade in warm light
Home.editorialStripCaption: Nairobi prime residential · Parklands · Kilimani · Westlands
Home.storySectionTitle: A clear client journey from first brief to handover.
Home.story1ImageAlt: Contemporary home exterior with clean lines
Home.story3ImageAlt: Modern pool and architecture at dusk
Home.story1Body: We define your priorities first: budget range, timeline, lifestyle needs, and whether the goal is living comfort or investment return.
Home.story2Body: You receive vetted options only, with clear pricing context, neighbourhood fit, and document checks before you commit to viewings.
Home.story3Body: We guide negotiation, paperwork, and final transfer so you move from selected listing to signed close with confidence.
Home.portfolioMastheadLine: An editorial sequence of homes — each introduced in context, then explored in full on its own page.
Home.portfolioNarrative: Explore two curated collections designed for distinct goals: Living for everyday home life, and Investment for long-term value and yield.
Home.portfolioPreviewNote: Curated preview only · open full pages for complete portfolios
Home.livingCollectionLead: For families and professionals who want space, schools, and neighbourhoods that feel like home — not just a transaction.
Home.investmentCollectionLead: For yield, land, and long-term upside — vetted options for local and diaspora investors building in Nairobi.
Home.featuredSub: Explore our handpicked selection of premium homes and apartments currently available in Nairobi.
Home.livingCollectionSub: Homes and rentals chosen for everyday life — space, schools, and neighbourhoods you want to come home to.
Home.investmentCollectionSub: Listings with yield, land, and upside — curated for diaspora and local investors building in Nairobi.
Home.devHeroSub: A curated walkthrough for buyers and investors: compare Living and Investment opportunities, then move forward with a clear advisory path.
Home.devWalkthroughTitle: Choose with clarity before you book a viewing.
Home.devWalkthroughBody: Start with the collection that fits your goal, review a tight shortlist with our advisors, then move to viewings and paperwork with full transparency on pricing and timelines.
Home.devStep1Body: Select Living for lifestyle-led homes or Investment for yield and long-term upside.
Home.devStep2Body: We narrow to high-match options by budget, location, and expected outcomes.
Home.devStep3Body: Book viewings, run due diligence, and close with support from offer to handover.
Home.serviceSalesBody: Discover verified apartments, houses, and townhouses for sale in Nairobi's prime locations. Every listing is inspected and vetted by our team.
Home.serviceRentBody: Find your next rental home — from furnished studio apartments to spacious family units. We handle viewings, negotiations, and paperwork so you don't have to.
Home.serviceAdvisoryBody: Not sure where to start? Our advisors offer personalised guidance on market trends, investment potential, and neighbourhood comparisons to help you make an informed decision.
Home.serviceDiasporaBody: Living abroad and looking to invest back home? We offer remote viewing tours, virtual consultations, and secure transaction management for diaspora clients worldwide.

About.heroSub: A real estate company built on trust, transparency, and a deep understanding of what home means.

ServicesPage.heroSub: Comprehensive real estate services tailored to your needs — whether you're buying, renting, selling, or investing.

PropertiesPage.heroSub: Browse verified homes and apartments available for sale and rent across Nairobi.
PropertiesPage.empty: No properties match your criteria right now. Adjust your filters or contact us directly — we may have unlisted options that suit your needs.
PropertiesPage.journeyTitle: Need help choosing the right listing?
PropertiesPage.journeyBody: Share your budget and preferred areas, and our team will shortlist high-fit options, arrange viewings, and guide you through the next steps.

AreasPage.heroSub: We specialise in Nairobi's most sought-after residential areas. Here's what makes each neighbourhood unique.

ContactPage.heroSub: Whether you're ready to view a property or just starting your search, we'd love to hear from you.
ContactPage.expectBody: A DRL advisor reviews your request and reaches out within one business day with suitable options and next steps.
ContactPage.privacyNote: Your details are used only to respond to your enquiry and arrange property support. We do not share your information with third parties.
ContactPage.success: Thank you — we'll be in touch shortly.
ContactPage.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or WhatsApp us.

Property.enquiryAssuranceBody: Expect a response within one business day with viewing options, required documents, and clear next steps.
Property.projectOverviewBody: Designed for residents and investors seeking quality planning, efficient layouts, and enduring finishes in one of Nairobi's most connected neighbourhoods.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved.
